channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Colleges got more rural students to apply. The challenge is getting them to attend
item.description: Some of the nation's most selective institutions are slowly increasing their rural enrollment with the help of millions of dollars from a rural alumnu...

item.title: This Republican voted to convict Trump. Now he's up for reelection. Can he survive?
item.description: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy was one of seven Republican senators who voted to impeach President Trump. Now he's running for reelection in a race that ...

item.title: Eurovision Song Contest grand final features pop music and protests
item.description: The Eurovision final takes place Saturday amid tight security and rain, but fan enthusiasm and opposition remain strong.

item.title: Vilseck, Germany residents fear Trump may withdraw 5,000 US troops
item.description: President Trump's threat to withdraw troops worries a Bavarian town that depends on US military personnel and their families.
